name: aicoding-ai-debug-repair-kit
description: Codex skills and CLI assets for fixed non-invasive TI DSS debug workflows, bounded repair loops, session evidence, and policy-gated J-Link operation stubs.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded build/test repair loops for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides fixed airepair dss commands for non-invasive TI XDS / CCS DSS debug workflows, including connect-test, core-list, monitor-address, monitor-symbol, find-changing-symbol, report, bounded repair-loop skills, session evidence, and policy-gated J-Link operation stubs. The kit avoids flash/reset/halt/run/loadProgram/erase/write by default.
defaultPrompt: Use ai-debug-kit-deploy to validate the AI Debug Repair Kit in this repository.
Use ai-debug-repair-loop to run a bounded build/test repair loop without flash, reset, commit, or push.
Use airepair dss validate-profile and airepair dss doctor before any TI XDS / CCS DSS read-only operation.
Use airepair jlink capabilities and airepair jlink validate-profile before any J-Link operation; invasive J-Link operations are disabled unless explicitly enabled in profile.
